examples: He remained for some years avowedly radical in his political outlook.
But the worst is that the essential songs avowedly do not stand in the proper order.
Yet under Tony Blair, their most avowedly Europhile prime minister, Britons actually grew more hostile.
To stop prices falling, controls were brought in, alongside other new and avowedly anti-business regulations.
The remaining tangle is not something the avowedly free-market Kotak says he relishes.
